sections.title: If the player has not been teleported to the Sorceress's Garden before

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Cleaning, cleaning, always cleaning. This apprenticeship isn't all that it was cracked up to be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whose apprentice are you?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Oh, Aadeela, the sorceress upstairs, said she'd teach me magic, she did. And here I am scrubbing floors without a spell to help me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could cast a Water Blast or a Wind Blast spell to hurry things along if you'd like?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: No, no, she'd kill me or worse if she knew I was using Magic to do chores. Her last apprentice - well I'd rather not say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh go on, what happened to them?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: They say she turned them into little spiders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that's too bad. I had better leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Surely there must be upsides to the task?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Nope. Clean this, clean that. When I'm finished cleaning here I have to go help out in the garden.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What garden?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Oh, I shouldn't have told you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're right, you shouldn't have.

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Well, if you don't mind then, I'm busy and have to get back to work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't let me keep you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, you can talk to me. I can see you're having a bad day.

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: You know you're right. Nobody listens to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't blame them, all you do is whine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A sympathetic ear can do wonders.

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Yes, if I just let my frustrations out, I'd feel a lot better. Now what was I saying?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. You were whining about something or other. To tell you the truth, I wasn't really listening.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To tell you the truth, I wasn't really listening.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mentioned something about the garden.

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Oh yeah, that dreadful garden of hers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is it?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Oh, it's nowhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Well it's here, but not really. You see the sorceress is trying out some new type of compression magic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that sounds interesting - so how does it work?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: It would take too long to explain and, to be honest, I don't really understand how it works.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough, but tell me, how do you get to the garden?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: By magic! The sorceress did teach me one spell.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, cast the spell on me. It will be good Magic training for you.

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: I can't do that now, I'm far too busy sweeping.

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Oh you wouldn't mind?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course not. I'd be glad to help.

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Okay, here goes! Remember, to return, just drink from the fountain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that's nice. Well it's been great talking to you.

sections.title: If the player has been teleported to the Sorceress's Garden before

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey apprentice, do you want to try out your teleport skills again?

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Okay, here goes - and remember, to return just drink from the fountain.

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Seventior Disthinte Molesko!

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry, could you pick up your follower first? I'm really not sure that I could teleport the both of you.

sections.title: If the player has not been teleported to the Sorceress's Garden before

lines.speaker: Apprentice
lines.text: I can't do that now, I'm far too busy sweeping.
